final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing styled food photography image of fashionable coffee and desserts in a Korean cafe setting, with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays — no people.

Style/medium: needs a Korean-cafe Instagram-story aesthetic shot as if taken on a smartphone, with hand-drawn white-pen sketch annotations layered over the photo — exact photographic and illustration execution is yours
Composition: must include hand-drawn outline traces around each element, arrows and dashed lines as visual guides between annotations and subjects, with breathing "white space" preserved — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include coffee drink(s) and dessert/sweets as the focal subjects (no people); each element must carry a short hand-drawn annotation in the style described below
Scene/backdrop: must be a Korean cafe interior atmosphere
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, warm, Instagram-flatlay or lifestyle-shot atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a clean, muted, cafe-tonal direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs the annotation layer to feel like rough, slightly uneven single-stroke white-pen lines drawn freehand — exact line weight and texture are yours
Text (verbatim): must include hand-drawn Japanese handwriting annotations (7 parts hiragana, 3 parts simple kanji) for each element, short diary-like one-liners in the following voice:
  • drink → taste / temperature / mood (e.g., 「さわやか」「やさしい甘さ」)
  • food → texture / deliciousness (e.g., 「しっとり」「さいこう」)
  • space → atmosphere (e.g., 「くつろぐ」「いい時間」)
  • overall → one-line summary (e.g., 「しあわせすぎた〜」)
  decorative accents: steam wisps, sparkle marks, small heart symbols, tiny emoticon-like doodles — used sparingly
Constraints: must preserve the annotation overlay style: white-pen, single-stroke rough lines, outline-tracing of objects, arrow/dashed-line pointers; annotations must feel like Instagram story / rough magazine notes — fashionable yet casual; do not overcrowd, preserve visual breathing room
Avoid: people, faces, overly polished digital illustration style, heavy text blocks, cluttered annotations
